testcase.name: CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Basic markdown elements > renders bold markdown correctly
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Basic markdown elements > renders italic markdown correctly
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Basic markdown elements > renders inline code markdown correctly
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Basic markdown elements > renders strikethrough markdown correctly
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Complex markdown elements > renders unordered lists correctly
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Complex markdown elements > renders ordered lists correctly
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Complex markdown elements > renders headings correctly
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Complex markdown elements > renders blockquotes correctly
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Complex markdown elements > renders code blocks correctly
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Mentions and hashtags within markdown > renders mentions in markdown content
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Mentions and hashtags within markdown > renders hashtags in markdown content
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Mentions and hashtags within markdown > renders mentions and hashtags together with markdown
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Mentions and hashtags within markdown > preserves markdown in mentions
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Plain text comments (no markdown) > renders plain text without markdown processing
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Plain text comments (no markdown) > does not process asterisks as markdown in plain text
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Plain text comments (no markdown) > preserves backticks in plain text
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Auto-detection of markdown > auto-detects markdown in agent comments
testcase.system-out: [CommentThread] Auto-detected markdown in agent comment: test-comment-1

testcase.name: CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Auto-detection of markdown > auto-detects markdown in user comments with markdown syntax
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Edge cases > handles empty content gracefully
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Edge cases > handles special characters in markdown
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Edge cases > handles very long markdown content
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Edge cases > expands and collapses long markdown content
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Edge cases > handles markdown with line breaks
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Edge cases > handles malformed markdown gracefully
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Mixed content scenarios > combines all elements: markdown, mentions, hashtags, URLs
testcase.system-err: Backend preview API unavailable, using fallback: Failed to parse URL from /api/v1/link-preview?url=https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com

testcase.name: CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Mixed content scenarios > handles complex nested markdown
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Mixed content scenarios > preserves markdown in multi-level comment threads
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > URL and link handling > renders URLs as clickable links in markdown
testcase.system-err: Backend preview API unavailable, using fallback: Failed to parse URL from /api/v1/link-preview?url=https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com

testcase.name: CommentThread Markdown Rendering > URL and link handling > renders markdown links correctly

testcase.name: CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Performance and rendering > renders without throwing errors
CommentThread Markdown Rendering > Performance and rendering > handles rapid content updates
